title: GoldRush Kit Approval Manager
description: Drop-in React component that shows all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals for a wallet using ApprovalsListView — with built-in revoke functionality, risk scoring, and value-at-risk display.
useCase: Add a token approval manager to any wallet app — show users all their active approvals with risk scores and let them revoke dangerous ones in one click.

keyParams.address: 0x wallet address whose approvals to display
keyParams.chain_names: Array of chain names to check approvals across
